highlights: Beat now plays a backing beat you can play along to — tap in time with the rhythm.
The groove speeds up the longer you last in Endless.
Music plays even with the phone on silent (iOS audio-session fix).
Builds on the 72 Beat redesign (Piano-Tiles tap, Endless default, inline tutorial).
Beat music game, reimagined: tap each tile in its lane (Piano-Tiles style).
Endless is the default — the beat speeds up the longer you last.
New friendly first-time tutorial guides you right as you play.
Daily streaks sync across devices; Android leaderboard & sign-in fixes.
Smoother tab bar; newest games appear first.
New game — Beat: a fast, fun music tap game. Play by level or endless.
Download extra music tracks to play along to.
Daily streaks now sync across your devices through your account.
Fix: leaderboards and sign-in now work reliably on Android.
Smoother bottom tab bar; the name prompt now shows on the home screen.
Newest games appear first.
Beat music game + downloadable online music tracks.
Database-backed daily streaks (server API).
Android API base fix — leaderboard & sign-in.
iOS 26 native Liquid Glass tab bar fix.
Leaderboards — compete for the top spot in every game.
In-app Contact Support with device info attached.
Delete Account from Settings anytime.
Multiple players on one device — add and switch profiles.
Stability, performance and dark-theme polish.
